name: createFacebookAdCampaign
description:
Creates a Facebook Ad Campaign. IMPORTANT Workflow:
1. First use listAccounts to select an ad account
2. Ask user for campaign duration (start and end dates)
3. Convert user-friendly dates to ISO 8601 format
4. NEVER create campaign without confirmed dates
5. Ensure start date is today or future
6. Default to 30 days duration if user is unsure

ad_account_id.description: The ID of the ad account. MUST be obtained first through listAccounts command before attempting campaign creation.

name.description: The name of the ad campaign

objective.description: The objective of the ad campaign

status.description: The status of the ad campaign (e.g., ACTIVE, PAUSED, ARCHIVED)

start_time.description: REQUIRED: Start time in ISO 8601 format. MUST ASK user for start date. Convert user-friendly date to ISO format. MUST be today or future date.

end_time.description: REQUIRED: End time in ISO 8601 format. MUST ASK user for campaign duration or end date. Default to start_time + 30 days if unspecified. MUST be after start_time.
